array.string: identifier "@WS_MAC_GUI_BUNDLE_ID@" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = @DEVELOPMENT_TEAM@

identifier "@WS_MAC_INSTALLER_BUNDLE_ID@" and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = @DEVELOPMENT_TEAM@
